description: ⚠️ WRITE OPERATION - Confirm with user before calling. Generates the Connect Card URI for the connection

parameters.name: connectionId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the connection. Retrieve it from the `id` field in the [List All Connections](https://fivetran.com/docs/rest-api/api-reference/connections/list-connections) response, or from the `id` field returned when you [Create a Connection](https://fivetran.com/docs/rest-api/api-reference/connections/create-connection).

connect_card_config.description: Configuration for the Connect Card flow. Connect Card is a Fivetran-hosted UI that allows your end users to authorize a connection without accessing the Fivetran dashboard. Use `redirect_uri` to control where users land after completing setup.

redirect_uri.description: The URI on your site we redirect the end user to after successful setup. The URI must start with the `https` or `http` prefix.

hide_setup_guide.description: An optional parameter that lets you hide the embedded setup guide in the Connect Card.

all_fields.description: An optional parameter that lets you show all fields on Connect Card including those that are hidden by default for certain connectors.

connector_id.description: The unique identifier of the connection for which this Connect Card token was issued. This is the same value as the `connectionId` path parameter.

token.description: A short-lived JWT that authorizes the end user to configure this connection via the Connect Card interface. Use the `uri` field directly to redirect users — it already embeds this token. If you need to construct your own URL, pass this value as the `auth` query parameter to `https://fivetran.com/connect-card/setup`.

uri.description: The complete URL to redirect the end user to in order to authorize the connection. It embeds the auth token, redirect URI, and setup guide visibility as query parameters. Redirect the user directly to this address.

redirect_uri.description: The URI on your site we redirect the end user to after successful setup. The URI must start with the `https` or `http` prefix.

hide_setup_guide.description: An optional parameter that lets you hide the embedded setup guide in the Connect Card.

all_fields.description: An optional parameter that lets you show all fields on Connect Card including those that are hidden by default for certain connectors.
